summary: Iteration 10 - Music Feature testing complete. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend code review verified all requested features. UI interaction testing limited due to React Native Web text input handling on login page (known issue from iteration 9).

issues: React Native TextInput fields don't register standard HTML input events in web preview - requires native app testing for full UI verification (known issue from iteration 9)

critical_code_review_comments: MUSIC GENRES API VERIFIED: GET /api/music/genres returns ['ALL', 'SAMBA', 'TANGO', 'LATIN', 'HIP HOP', 'JAZZ', 'CONTEMPORARY', 'AFRO', 'REGGAETON']
PLAYLIST CRUD VERIFIED: POST/GET/DELETE /api/music/playlists all working with correct response schemas
SONG UPLOAD VERIFIED: POST /api/music/songs/upload accepts multipart form-data with file, title, artist, genre fields. Uses ffprobe for duration detection
SONG LIST VERIFIED: GET /api/music/songs supports genre filter and liked_only filter parameters
SONG LIKE TOGGLE VERIFIED: POST /api/music/songs/{id}/like correctly toggles like status
SONG MOVE VERIFIED: PUT /api/music/songs/{id}/playlist correctly moves song between playlists
SONG DELETE VERIFIED: DELETE /api/music/songs/{id} removes song and associated likes

MUSIC PAGE UI VERIFIED: music.tsx has 'Your playlist' header, genre pills (ALL, SAMBA, TANGO, etc.), action buttons (Add Song, Add Playlist, Liked Songs), playlist list with song counts, song list with like heart and drag handle
EMPTY STATE VERIFIED: music.tsx shows 'Nessuna canzone' message when no songs

PLAYER PAGE VERIFIED: player/[id].tsx has cover art, progress bar, play/pause/skip controls, waveform visualization (60 pseudo-random bars), speed control slider (-5 to +5 mapping to 0.5x-1.5x playback rate)
TABBAR MUSIC TAB VERIFIED: TabBar.tsx has music tab with data-testid='tab-music' for navigation

DATA-TESTID ATTRIBUTES VERIFIED: music.tsx has data-testid='add-song-btn', data-testid='add-playlist-btn', data-testid='song-row-{id}'; player/[id].tsx has data-testid='play-pause-btn', data-testid='player-close-btn'
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test playlists and songs during backend testing. One playlist 'My Dance Mix' exists in DB from previous testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Music feature fully implemented and tested. All 9 backend endpoints working: GET /api/music/genres, POST/GET/DELETE /api/music/playlists, POST /api/music/songs/upload, GET /api/music/songs, POST /api/music/songs/{id}/like, PUT /api/music/songs/{id}/playlist, DELETE /api/music/songs/{id}. Frontend components verified via code review: music.tsx (main library page), player/[id].tsx (player with waveform and speed control). TabBar has music tab with data-testid. React Native Web text input issue persists for login on web - use native app for full UI testing.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/music/genres: PASSED - Returns list of dance genres
backend_api_tests.POST /api/music/playlists: PASSED - Creates playlist with name and genre
backend_api_tests.GET /api/music/playlists: PASSED - Returns user's playlists with song count
backend_api_tests.POST /api/music/songs/upload: PASSED - Uploads audio file with title, artist, genre
backend_api_tests.GET /api/music/songs: PASSED - Returns songs with genre and liked_only filters

frontend_code_review.Add New Song button: VERIFIED in music.tsx line 248 with data-testid='add-song-btn'
frontend_code_review.Add New Playlist button: VERIFIED in music.tsx line 254 with data-testid='add-playlist-btn'
frontend_code_review.Player play/pause button: VERIFIED in player/[id].tsx line 242 with data-testid='play-pause-btn'
frontend_code_review.TabBar music tab: VERIFIED in TabBar.tsx line 21 with data-testid='tab-music'

mocked_api_note: Payment in lessons remains MOCKED. Music feature has NO mocked APIs - all endpoints are fully functional.
